S

PRE Logistics Support Gamma

Station / Port · First seen 3302-09-22 · 4 mentions
Active: 3302-09-22 → 3303-06-02
Station Overview

PRE Logistics Support Gamma anchored one corner of the Pleiades Resource Enterprise's supply network during the critical early period of Thargoid incursions. Operating in coordination with the Merope Expeditionary Fleet, the starport handled the movement of combat materiel, rescue supplies and personnel transfers that sustained Imperial operations across multiple threatened systems.

The station's location near Merope and Pleiades Sector IH-V c2-5 placed it within easy reach of both the combat front and the resource extraction facilities that powered the war effort. Though never as celebrated as forward outposts like Orcus Crag or Moni's Hub, PRE Logistics Support Gamma performed the essential but unglamorous work of maintaining supply lines. Its nine-month period of active mention in GalNet records corresponded almost exactly to the most intense phase of the initial Thargoid offensive.

Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3303-06-02
Galactic News Superpower Campaigns Conclude
The Empire and Federation announced the successful conclusion of their respective campaigns to construct new outposts in the Pleiades region.
3303-05-26
Community Goal Superpower Expansion
The Empire and Federation are constructing new bases in the Pleiades region, with both superpowers placing open orders for construction materials.
3302-09-29
Galactic News Enthusiastic Response to Federal Appeal
The Pleiades Resource Enterprise has announced that its Federal appeal for exploration data in the Pleiades Nebula was enthusiastically received, with hundreds of pilots contributing astronomical data.
3302-09-22
Community Goal Federation Appeals for Exploration Data
The Federation has issued a public appeal for exploration data in the Pleiades Nebula, coordinated by the Pleiades Resource Enterprise, to gather comprehensive information following the discovery of possible non-human wreckage.
